first_seen.description: ISO date string when the property was first discovered.

last_seen.description: ISO date string when the property was last seen in a scrape.

discovery_count.description: Total number of times this property has been discovered across multiple days.

is_new.description: True if the property was discovered for the first time in the current scrape session.

address.description: Full street address of the property.

image_url.description: Direct URL to the primary high-res hero image (1024px+).

gallery.description: An array of URLs for the top 5 most descriptive interior/exterior images.

streetview_url.description: A direct link to a Google StreetView or similar based on lat/lng.

floorplan_url.description: A direct link to the property floorplan image.

list_price.description: The current asking price in GBP.

realistic_price.description: The calculated target bid price based on market conditions and DoM.

sqft.description: Internal floor area in square feet.

nearest_tube_distance.description: Estimated walking distance (in meters) to the closest Tube or Overground station.

park_proximity.description: Distance (in meters) to the nearest major green space.

commute_paternoster.description: Travel time (in minutes) to Paternoster Square (St Paul's) via public transport.

commute_canada_square.description: Travel time (in minutes) to Canada Square (Canary Wharf) via public transport.

epc_improvement_potential.description: Potential EPC energy efficiency rating after improvements.

est_capex_requirement.description: Estimated capital expenditure required for property improvements.

tenure.description: Property tenure status (e.g., 'Share of Freehold', 'Leasehold (999 yrs)').

source.description: The ingestion channel for this asset.

source_name.description: The specific name of the source (e.g., 'Savills Search').

appreciation_potential.description: Calculated likelihood of capital growth over a 5-year horizon (0-10).

price_reduction_amount.description: Total amount the asking price has been reduced by.

price_reduction_percent.description: Percentage of the asking price that has been reduced.

days_since_reduction.description: Number of days since the last price reduction.

waitrose_distance.description: Distance (in meters) to the nearest Waitrose.

whole_foods_distance.description: Distance (in meters) to the nearest Whole Foods.

wellness_hub_distance.description: Distance (in meters) to the nearest Wellness hub.

links.description: A list of direct links to the property listing.

market_status.description: Current market status of the property. Set to 'active' by sync pipeline on new ingest. Updated by analyst or /api/properties/:id/check endpoint.

last_checked.description: ISO date string (YYYY-MM-DD) of the last time this property was checked against its source portal. Updated by sync pipeline on re-seeing, or by POST /api/properties/:id/check.
